name: Gate A (Verizon Gate)
location: North Entrance, near Parking Lot G and H
transit: Closest to the Meadowlands Sports Complex rail station. Direct shuttle service available from Lots F and G.
accessibility: Equipped with wide accessible turnstiles, low-slope ramps, tactile ground paths for visually impaired, and passenger drop-off zones immediately outside.
hours: Opens 3 hours prior to match kick-off, closes 1 hour after match ends.

name: Gate B (SAP Gate)
location: North-East Entrance, near Parking Lot E and F
transit: Direct pedestrian walkway from the bus terminal. Taxi/rideshare drop-off area is located 200m away in Lot E.
accessibility: Wheelchair loan depot is located right inside Gate B. Step-free entry, accessible escalators to Level 2.
hours: Opens 3 hours prior to match kick-off, closes 1 hour after match ends.

name: Gate C (MetLife Gate)
location: East Entrance, near Parking Lot D and C
transit: Direct train walkway connecting NJ Transit rail line. Closest entrance for regional rail travellers.
accessibility: Full accessibility ramps, ADA assistance kiosk inside the lobby. Elevators nearby accessing all tiers.
hours: Opens 3 hours prior to match kick-off, closes 1 hour after match ends.

name: Gate D (Hertz Gate)
location: South Entrance, near Parking Lot B and A
transit: Closest to the charter bus parking area (Lot A). Direct pedestrian pathways from South parking lots.
accessibility: Level access, low turnstiles, tactile paving, sensory kit pick-up location in the guest services suite.
hours: Opens 3 hours prior to match kick-off, closes 1 hour after match ends.

name: Gate E (Pepsi Gate)
location: South-West Entrance, near Parking Lot K and L
transit: Pedestrian crossing to the West parking garage. Shuttle pickup location for accessibility parking in Lot K.
accessibility: Wheelchair ramp, sign-language interpreter assistance station immediately inside the gate.
hours: Opens 3 hours prior to match kick-off, closes 1 hour after match ends.

name: Gate F (Bud Light Gate)
location: West Entrance, near Parking Lot J
transit: Direct path from the VIP / Media parking (Lot J). Adjacent to media checkpoint.
accessibility: Step-free security screening lines. High-contrast signage, braille maps available at the gate services kiosk.
hours: Opens 3.5 hours prior to match kick-off (early access for VIP and Suite ticket holders).
